name: 文体传统
subject: english
domain_name: 互文与跨文本 / Intertextuality / Intertextuality
curriculum_points: Students will be able to identify the defining formal and thematic conventions of major literary genres (e.g., tragedy, satire, bildungsroman) and analyse how individual texts adhere to or subvert these conventions.
Students will be able to classify non-literary texts by genre (e.g., editorial, manifesto, travel writing) and evaluate the strategic use of generic conventions to achieve a communicative purpose.

interactive_resources.note: 制作课件时在 search_url 搜索对应练习，获取 embed 代码嵌入
